title: quota_get drops state token — blocks Quota/changes
description: quota_get returns Vec<Quota> instead of GetResponse<Quota>, discarding the state token. Every other _get method (chat_get, message_get, space_get, etc.) returns GetResponse<T> which includes state. When Quota/changes is added, callers will have no state to pass to it — the only fix would be a breaking change to quota_get's return type. Fix: return GetResponse<Quota> and remove the private QuotaGetResponse intermediary. Callers who only want the list use .list on the result.
